title: Speaking – Part 3: Collaborative Task
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.centralQuestion: What are the benefits and drawbacks of different public transportation systems in urban areas?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which TWO options would be most effective for improving accessibility for residents.
options: Implementing a city-wide bicycle rental system

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes.
Here are some suggestions about improving public transportation in urban areas. [Shows task card]
First, discuss the advantages and disadvantages of each option. Then decide which two would be most effective for improving accessibility for residents. You have about two minutes.
Now decide together which two options would be most effective for improving accessibility for residents.
